title: Story 3: NLP Parser + CLI Polish
body:
# Story 3: NLP Parser + CLI Polish

## Parent Epic
#1 (sage-dice NLP Dice Roller)

**Points:** 5
**Dependency Type:** DEPENDS on Story 1 (#2), PARALLEL with Story 2 (#3)
**Repository:** [user/sage-dice](https://forgejo.example.com/user/sage-dice)
**Spec Reference:** #12 (Discussion - D4 Parser Security, D5 JSON Fallback, D8 Types)

---

## Dependency Details

**DEPENDS #2** - Uses all D8 types from Story 1 (required)
**PARALLEL #3** - Story 2 adds exploding/Fate; this story doesn't require them

This story wraps the Story 1 engine with CLI (clap) and NLP (Ollama).
If Story 2 is complete, NLP can recognize "exploding" and "Fate" - graceful enhancement.
If Story 2 is not complete, NLP returns notation that Story 1 can handle.

**NO "optional but recommended"** - dependencies are explicit.

---

## CI Strategy

**Problem:** Ollama tests can't run in CI without Ollama.
**Solution:** 50%+ tests must be CI-runnable without Ollama.

| Test Category | CI-Runnable | Strategy |
|---------------|-------------|----------|
| CLI parsing | ✅ Yes | No external deps |
| CLI help/version | ✅ Yes | No external deps |
| NLP prompt building | ✅ Yes | Test prompt generation |
| NLP response parsing | ✅ Yes | Mock JSON responses |
| NLP end-to-end | ❌ No | `#[ignore]` + integration |
| JSON output format | ✅ Yes | No external deps |

**Target:** 75% CI-runnable (6/8 test categories)

---

## User Story

**As a** user
**I want** to describe dice rolls in plain English
**So that** I do not need to remember notation

---

## Implementation Details

(See chunk issues #20-#25 for detailed implementation specs per module)

---

## Definition of Done

- [ ] `sage-dice --help` shows usage with examples
- [ ] `sage-dice --version` shows version
- [ ] `sage-dice --notation 2d6+3` bypasses LLM
- [ ] `sage-dice --seed 42 d20` produces deterministic output
- [ ] `sage-dice --json 2d6` outputs valid JSON
- [ ] `sage-dice "roll a d20"` translates via LLM (when available)
- [ ] Fallback to direct parse when LLM fails (D5)
- [ ] LLM output goes through parser for security (D4)
- [ ] 75%+ tests run in CI (without Ollama)
- [ ] `cargo test` passes (non-ignored tests)

---

## Notes for Implementing Agent

1. **Types from Story 1** - Use D8 types, no redefinition
2. **reqwest blocking** - Use blocking client for simplicity
3. **Ollama endpoint** - `http://localhost:11434/api/generate`
4. **Model** - `llama3.1:8b` per #12 Prerequisites
5. **CI tests** - Must not require Ollama
6. **Fallback** - If LLM fails, try direct notation parse (D5)
7. **Security** - All LLM output goes through parser (D4)

---

## Chunks

This story is broken into chunks #20, #21, #22, #23, #24, #25. See those issues for detailed implementation specs.

| Chunk | Issue | Focus |
|-------|-------|-------|
| 4-1 | #20 | CLI Foundation (clap) |
| 4-2 | #21 | NLP Module (Ollama) |
| 4-3 | #22 | JSON Output Module |
| 4-4 | #23 | CLI Tests (CI-runnable) |
| 4-5 | #24 | NLP Tests (mixed CI/integration) |
| 4-6 | #25 | Main CLI+NLP Wiring |
